measures.name: Selected Year
measures.dax: SELECTEDVALUE ( 'Select Year'[Select Year], 2023 )
measures.description: Year chosen in the Select Year parameter slicer (defaults to 2023).

measures.name: Total Sales
measures.dax: SUM ( 'Orders'[Sales] )

measures.name: Total Profit
measures.dax: SUM ( 'Orders'[Profit] )

measures.name: Total Quantity
measures.dax: SUM ( 'Orders'[Quantity] )

measures.name: Total Customers
measures.dax: DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Customer ID] )

measures.name: Total Orders
measures.dax: DISTINCTCOUNT ( 'Orders'[Order ID] )

measures.name: Sales per Customer
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [Total Sales], [Total Customers] )

measures.name: CY Sales
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year]
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: CY Profit
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year]
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Profit], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: CY Quantity
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year]
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Quantity], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: CY Customers
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year]
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Customers], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: CY Orders
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year]
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Orders], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: CY Sales per Customer
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Sales], [CY Customers] )
measures.description: Sales per customer in the selected year.

measures.name: PY Sales
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Sales], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: PY Profit
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Profit], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: PY Quantity
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Quantity], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: PY Customers
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Customers], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: PY Orders
measures.dax:
VAR yr = [Selected Year] - 1
RETURN
CALCULATE ( [Total Orders], FILTER ( ALL ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), YEAR ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ) = yr ) )

measures.name: PY Sales per Customer
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [PY Sales], [PY Customers] )
measures.description: Sales per customer in the prior year.

measures.name: % Diff Sales
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Sales] - [PY Sales], [PY Sales] )

measures.name: % Diff Profit
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Profit] - [PY Profit], [PY Profit] )

measures.name: % Diff Quantity
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Quantity] - [PY Quantity], [PY Quantity] )

measures.name: % Diff Customers
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Customers] - [PY Customers], [PY Customers] )

measures.name: % Diff Orders
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Orders] - [PY Orders], [PY Orders] )

measures.name: % Diff Sales per Customers
measures.dax: DIVIDE ( [CY Sales per Customer] - [PY Sales per Customer], [PY Sales per Customer] )
measures.description: Year-over-year change in sales per customer.

measures.name: KPI CY Less PY
measures.dax: IF ( [CY Sales] < [PY Sales], "⬤", "" )
measures.description: Dot glyph shown when current-year sales fall below the prior year.

measures.name: KPI Sales Avg
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Sales]
VAR avg = AVERAGEX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Sales] )
RETURN
IF ( cur > avg, "Above", "Below" )
measures.description: Marks each period above or below the average current-year sales (Tableau WINDOW_AVG).

measures.name: KPI Profit Avg
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Profit]
VAR avg = AVERAGEX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Profit] )
RETURN
IF ( cur > avg, "Above", "Below" )
measures.description: Marks each period above or below the average current-year profit (Tableau WINDOW_AVG).

measures.name: Min/Max Sales
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Sales]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Sales] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Sales] )
RETURN
IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns sales only at the highest/lowest period (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).

measures.name: Min/Max Profit
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Profit]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Profit] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Profit] )
RETURN
IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns profit only at the highest/lowest period (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).

measures.name: Min/Max Quantity
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Quantity]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Quantity] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Quantity] )
RETURN
IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns quantity only at the highest/lowest period (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).

measures.name: Min/Max Orders
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Orders]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Orders] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Orders] )
RETURN
IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns order count only at the highest/lowest period (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).

measures.name: Min/Max Customers
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Customers]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Customers] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Customers] )
RETURN
IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns customer count only at the highest/lowest period (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).

measures.name: Min/Max Sales Per Customers
measures.dax:
VAR cur = [CY Sales per Customer]
VAR mx = MAXX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Sales per Customer] )
VAR mn = MINX ( ALLSELECTED ( 'Orders'[Order Date] ), [CY Sales per Customer] )
RETURN
IF ( cur = mx || cur = mn, cur )
measures.description: Returns sales-per-customer only at the highest/lowest period (Tableau WINDOW_MAX/MIN).
